name: Din Djarin
description: Mandalorian bounty hunter and foundling guardian of Grogu.

name: Grogu
description: Force-sensitive foundling protected by Din Djarin.

name: Bo-Katan Kryze
description: Mandalorian warrior and leader connected to Clan Kryze and the Darksaber.

name: Moff Gideon
description: Imperial remnant leader who pursued Grogu and wielded the Darksaber.

name: Greef Karga
description: Former bounty guild magistrate who became High Magistrate of Nevarro.

name: The Armorer
description: Leader and keeper of tradition for a Mandalorian covert.

name: Paz Vizsla
description: Heavy infantry Mandalorian and member of Clan Vizsla.

name: Kuiil
description: Ugnaught moisture farmer and ally of Din Djarin.

name: Peli Motto
description: Tatooine mechanic and ally of Din Djarin.

name: Dr. Pershing
description: Scientist connected to Imperial remnant cloning research.

name: Fennec Shand
description: Elite assassin and later ally of Boba Fett.

name: Cobb Vanth
description: Marshal of Mos Pelgo/Freetown who wore recovered Mandalorian armor.

name: Luthen Rael
description: Antiquities dealer and secret architect of early Rebel activity.

name: Bix Caleen
description: Ferrix mechanic and friend of Cassian Andor.

name: Dedra Meero
description: Ambitious Imperial Security Bureau supervisor.

name: Syril Karn
description: Former Pre-Mor security inspector obsessed with Cassian Andor.

name: Maarva Andor
description: Cassian Andor's adoptive mother and Ferrix community figure.

name: Vel Sartha
description: Rebel operative who led the Aldhani heist team.

name: Cinta Kaz
description: Committed rebel operative and member of the Aldhani team.

name: Kleya Marki
description: Luthen Rael's trusted assistant and rebel network operative.

name: Kino Loy
description: Prison floor manager who helped spark an escape from Narkina 5.

name: Brasso
description: Cassian Andor's loyal friend on Ferrix.

name: Reva
description: The Third Sister, an Inquisitor hunting Obi-Wan Kenobi.

name: The Grand Inquisitor
description: Leader of the Inquisitorius during the Imperial era.

name: Fifth Brother Inquisitor
description: Inquisitor active in the hunt for surviving Jedi.

name: Owen Lars
description: Moisture farmer and uncle of Luke Skywalker.

name: Baylan Skoll
description: Former Jedi turned mercenary who sought power beyond the known galaxy.

name: Shin Hati
description: Baylan Skoll's apprentice and a dark-side Force user.

name: Morgan Elsbeth
description: Magistrate and ally of Grand Admiral Thrawn.

name: Captain Enoch
description: Captain of Thrawn's guard aboard the Chimaera.

name: Marrok
description: Inquisitor and mercenary serving Morgan Elsbeth.
